bonuses.leadin: A watercolor landscape by this artist shows a group of broken tree trunks separated from a grove of living pines by a pond. For 10 points each:
parts: Name this artist whose other watercolor landscapes include The Water Drawing Mill. This man painted several watercolors showing deserted courtyards in Innsbruck Castle while traveling to Italy.
This other German artist painted what is considered one of the earliest pure landscapes on oil. That work by this artist shows the titular footbridge between a gatehouse and a larch tree.
Altdorfer was part of a school of landscape painting named for one of these geographic features. An American movement named after one of these things included Thomas Cole.
answers_sanitized: rivers [accept Danube School or Hudson River School]
